pi_items.source: Task description aligns with this occupation. Validated against verifier constraints.
Task description involves event planning and hospitality space layout.
verifier.py explicitly checks `passed = score >= 70` on line 125.
verifier.py assigns up to 25+20+20+20+15 = 100 total points across its 5 criteria.
setup_task.sh creates this exact file at /home/ga/Documents/SweetHome3D/wedding_venue_starter.sh3d by dynamically stripping furniture and floor colors from an existing Sweet Home 3D sample.

export_result.sh and verifier.py extract and strictly evaluate furniture counts (furniture_placement), room counts and floor colors/textures (room_definition, floor_color), and label counts (label_placement).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated 'wedding_venue_starter.sh3d' building shell, which is programmatically stripped from 'SweetHome3DExample7.sh3d' via setup_task.sh. All metadata claims exactly match the verifier logic and setup scripts, including the pass threshold of 70, total points of 100, and required features involving furniture placement, room definition, floor coloring, and labeling.
